news.headline: Frontline plc will present Q4 2024 results on Feb 28, 2025, 15:00 CET via webcast/conference call.
news.summary: Frontline plc will be showcasing its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2024 during a webcast/conference call scheduled for February 28, 2025, at 15:00 CET. This event will provide an overview of the company's results, including key figures and insights into its quarterly performance.

news.headline: Binance clarifies: No large token selling. Spokesperson says rumour is false.
news.summary: According to a representative from Binance, the company has not sold or dumped significant quantities of tokens despite misinformation circulating on social media. The spokesperson clarified this misinformation to Cointelegraph.

news.headline: Lilly's Jaypirca recommended for EU approval for relapsed/refractory CLL. Based on Phase 3 trial BRUIN CLL-321.
news.summary: A favorable assessment has been made following findings from the Phase 3 BRUIN CLL-321 trial, which were showcased at the 2024 American Society of Hematology Annual Meeting. Noteworthy for being the primary randomized Phase 3 investigation in CLL solely involving individuals with prior BTK treatment, the study has garnered positive feedback.

news.headline: Costa Rica attracts 73 investment projects in 2024, including 21 new companies, 52 reinvestment projects, and 5,500 new jobs.
news.summary: In 2024, Costa Rica attracted significant foreign investment with 21 new companies, 52 reinvestment projects, and the creation of 5,500 new net jobs. The country faced challenges due to evolving technologies, global political dynamics, enhanced incentives by competing nations, and a fierce competition for skilled professionals in high-demand fields.

news.headline: Julien's Auctions presents: Bold Luxury: The Limelight Edit - Collection of iconic fashion designs from Marilyn Monroe, Elizabeth Taylor, Cher, Victoria Beckham, Amy Winehouse, Hermes, Chanel, Giambatista Valli, and more. Live at The Peninsula Beverly Hills.
news.summary: Exclusive collection featuring iconic fashion designs from Marilyn Monroe, Elizabeth Taylor, Cher, Victoria Beckham, Amy Winehouse, Hermes, Chanel, Giambatista Valli, and more celebrities. A groundbreaking showcase of fashion and Hollywood iconography live at The Peninsula Beverly Hills hotel. Scheduled for the 27th of [month] with a diverse range of [number] legendary pieces on display.

news.headline: Frontline Q4 revenue beats estimates at $443.49M, but EPS drops to 20 cents from 46 cents last year. Reported spot TCEs also declined.
news.summary: Frontline Plc (NYSE:FRO) announced a 6.9% increase in fourth-quarter revenue to $443.491 million, exceeding the estimated $300.67 million. The adjusted EPS for the quarter dropped to 20 cents from 46 cents compared to the previous year, falling short of the predicted 36 cents. Spot TCEs for VLCCs, Suezmax tankers, and LR2/Aframax tankers were reported at $35,900, $33,300, and $26,100 per day, respectively showing a decrease from the previous year. Contracted ballast days stood at 1,116 for VLCCs, 238 for Suezmax tankers, and 174 for LR2/Aframax tankers at the end of the fourth quarter of 2024. Net operating income for the quarter decreased to $129.72 million from $138.05 million year-over-year. Operating cash flow in the fourth quarter amounted to $167.85 million. Operating margin contracted by 400 basis points to 29.3%.

news.headline: PCE inflation data may ease S&P 500 turbulence amid Trump's tariff threats, a key gauge for Fed.
news.summary: Investors are eagerly anticipating the release of the PCE price index by the Federal Reserve, a crucial inflation measure. This data is expected to bring positive news amidst turbulence in the S&P 500 due to potential tariff threats from the Trump administration. The PCE index could provide reassurance in the financial markets, offering some relief amid uncertainties. The focus remains on this key Fed data to gauge the economic landscape and potential impact on market trends.

news.headline: Dow Jones futs rise as Nasdaq and Nvidia plunge. Fed inflation gauge on horizon. Palantir loses key support.
news.summary: On Thursday, the stock market experienced losses primarily driven by Nasdaq and Nvidia, with Palantir also weakening essential support. The Federal Reserve's inflation indicator is a significant concern currently. Dow Jones futures are showing an increase, and market attention is on the impending release of the Fed's inflation gauge following the notable declines in Nasdaq and Nvidia.

news.headline: David Rawlinson and QVC Group, Inc. strike new 3-year agreement.
news.summary: The recent study on the effects of air pollution in urban areas revealed alarming statistics. Research conducted in major cities showed that air pollution levels have surpassed the safe limit set by the World Health Organization, with particulate matter (PM2.5) levels averaging at 60 micrograms per cubic meter. This high level of air pollution has been linked to an increase in respiratory diseases, with cases rising by 15% compared to last year. Additionally, the study highlighted that children and the elderly are the most vulnerable to the adverse effects of air pollution. Experts are urging immediate action to address this growing health crisis, emphasizing the need for stricter regulations and cleaner energy sources to combat pollution levels in urban environments.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures up as inflation data awaited; Nvidia stock fell below crucial level; key events highlighted.
news.summary: On Friday, Dow Jones futures experienced an increase in anticipation of significant inflation data. The stock of Nvidia saw a notable decline, falling below a crucial level on Thursday. This development comes amidst a backdrop of economic uncertainty and market volatility. Investors are closely monitoring the situation, with key numbers and data playing a crucial role in shaping their decisions. The fluctuation in futures and stock prices underscores the current financial landscape and the impact of external factors on market performance.

news.headline: CHMP recommends EU approval of Roche’s Columvi combo for relapsed or refractory DLBCL patients. Potential new treatment option if approved.
news.summary: In Basel on 28th February 2025, Roche disclosed that the CHMP has suggested the approval of Columvi® (glofitamab) alongside gemcitabine and oxaliplatin (GemOx) for treating adult patients with relapsed or refractory (R/R) diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL) who can't undergo autologous stem cell transplant (ASCT). Typically, R/R DLBCL patients receive high-dose chemotherapy and stem cell transplant as 2L therapy. Despite recent introduction of new therapies, not all patients have access to or qualify for them. The proposed Columvi combination may offer a much-needed, readily available treatment option. The European Commission is anticipated to make the final decision soon.

news.headline: CHMP reaffirms positive opinion for Lecanemab in early Alzheimer's disease in EU; BioArctic AB's partner Eisai reports.
news.summary: In Stockholm on February 28, 2025, BioArctic AB's (publ) partner Eisai revealed that the Committee for Medicinal Products for Human Use (CHMP) of the European Medicines Agency has reconfirmed its favorable opinion for the anti-Aβ monoclonal product. The company's stock is listed on Nasdaq Stockholm under the ticker symbol BIOA B.

news.headline: University of the People achieves WASC accreditation, solidifying its global position in higher education.
news.summary: Emphasizing its position as a key player in accessible higher education on a global scale, University of the People (UoPeople) based in PASADENA, Calif., declared on Feb. 28, 2025, that it has obtained accreditation from the WASC Senior College and University Commission. This acknowledgment cements UoPeople as a leading institution in the education sector.

news.headline: China vows to prevent sharp fluctuations in grain prices.
Kennel Connection, part of 100GROUP for 4 years, advances FinTech for pet care with software improvements. CEO Jeff Brodsly leads the innovation.
news.summary: In Moorpark, California, as of February 28, 2025, the company Kennel Connection, under the leadership of Owner and CEO Jeff Brodsly, has been thriving as a part of the 100GROUP organization for four years. It remains at the forefront of innovation in pet care technology. Throughout the last year, Kennel Connection has rolled out significant software upgrades, showcasing its commitment to driving advancements in the industry.

news.headline: Redfin reports 1 in 7 pending home sales canceled, 41,000 fall through in Jan; highest rate since 2017 (14.3%). Supply up, demand down.
news.summary: In Seattle, there has been a significant increase in home-purchase agreements falling through, with just over 41,000 agreements not coming to fruition in January. This accounts for 14.3% of homes that went under contract during that month. The report, provided by Redfin and accessible at redfin.com, highlights a rise from 13.4% compared to the previous year, marking the highest cancellation rate for this period since 2017. One of the main factors contributing to this trend is the imbalance between increasing housing supply and decreasing demand. This indicates a level of caution amongst current homebuyers in the market.

news.headline: Safe & Green Holdings Corp. is compliant with Nasdaq's listing requirements; given grace period until June 10, 2025 for compliance with minimum price bid, keeping securities listed on Nasdaq.
news.summary: In Miami, FL on February 28, 2025, Safe & Green Holdings Corp. (NASDAQ: SGBX), a prominent developer of modular structures, shared that Nasdaq's Hearings Panel has verified the company's adherence to the minimum equity standard outlined in Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(b)(1) and all other relevant criteria for staying listed on The Nasdaq Capital Market. Safe & Green Holdings has until June 10, 2025, to meet Nasdaq's minimum price bid requirement or face potential delisting. This resolution concludes the earlier disclosed listing concern, ensuring that the company's securities will continue to be traded on Nasdaq.

news.headline: nLIGHT, Inc. (Nasdaq: LASR) to participate in Raymond James & Associates 46th Annual Institutional Investors Conference on March 4, 2025 in Orlando, FL.
news.summary: nLIGHT, Inc. (Nasdaq: LASR), a top supplier of high-power lasers for crucial directed energy, optical sensing, and cutting-edge manufacturing uses, disclosed that its management will be attending key investor events in the first quarter. The company will be present at the Raymond James & Associates 46th Annual Institutional Investors Conference on March 4, 2025, at the JW Marriott Grande Lakes in Orlando, FL. The event will entail 1x1 meetings and a Company presentation scheduled for 4:35pm EDT.

news.headline: FinaMill unveils new branding, models, motors, color palette at The Inspired Home Show. Visit booth #S1038, Mar 2-4 in Chicago.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, in Portland, FinaMill revealed its unique approach to kitchen gadgets, emphasizing added enjoyment to culinary tasks. The company will be present at Booth #S1038 at The Inspired Home Show in Chicago from March 2nd to 4th. Visitors can explore the interactive Flavor Parlor to elevate their spice experience.

news.headline: Survey of 3,500 travelers reveals top concerns for summer 2025; emphasizes importance of travel insurance.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by Squaremouth surveyed 3,500 travelers to identify top concerns for the upcoming summer of 2025. The survey revealed that travelers are particularly concerned about potential issues following a winter filled with illness and airline disruptions. With an expensive spring travel season on the horizon, the survey shed light on how travel insurance can help alleviate these worries. The findings were released from St. Petersburg, Florida on February 28, 2025.

news.headline: Outlook Therapeutics resubmits BLA for ONS-5010 to FDA for treating wet AMD; achieved approval in EU & UK.
news.summary: In Iselin, New Jersey, on February 28, 2025, Outlook Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: OTLK) disclosed that it has re-submitted its Biologics License Application (BLA) to the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for ONS-5010. This biopharmaceutical company previously obtained regulatory approval in the European Union and the United Kingdom for the first authorized use of an ophthalmic formulation of bevacizumab to treat wet age-related macular degeneration (wet AMD). If FDA approves, ONS-5010 will be marketed as LYTENAVA™ (bevacizumab-vikg) for this indication.

news.headline: CCC Intelligent Solutions Holdings Inc. to present at Morgan Stanley Conference on March 4, 2025,  7:00 a.m. PT / 10:00 a.m. ET.
news.summary: Chicago-based CCC Intelligent Solutions Holdings Inc. disclosed that its CFO, Brian Herb, and VP of Investor Relations, Bill Warmington, will be speaking at the Morgan Stanley Technology, Media & Telecom Conference in San Francisco, CA. The event is set for Tuesday, March 4, 2025, at 7:00 a.m. PT / 10:00 a.m. ET. CCC, trading on NASDAQ under CCCS, is a prominent cloud platform provider serving the P&C insurance sector. This announcement was made by the company today.

news.headline: Radisys partners with Qualcomm for FR1 and FR2 platforms to boost small cell portfolio in telecom, targeting MNOs and enterprises.
news.summary: Radisys® Corporation, a prominent provider of open telecom solutions worldwide, has revealed that its acclaimed Connect RAN software is now accessible on the Qualcomm Dragonwing™ FSM200 Platform for FR1 and FR2. This offering utilizes the baseband and advanced Radio functionalities of the Dragonwing FSM200 platform to cater to high-performance and high-capacity use cases, encompassing essential features needed for different market sectors like Mobile Network Operators (MNOs), enterprises, Fixed Wireless Access (FWA), and private 5G networks.

news.headline: Green Dot and Marqeta collaborate to improve cash services for businesses. The partnership aims to enhance banking-as-a-service.
news.summary: Green Dot, a financial technology provider, has announced a partnership with Marqeta to enhance cash services for businesses. This collaboration aims to offer businesses better access to financial tools and services, boosting their operations. Through this partnership, companies can now access a wider range of cash management solutions, leveraging Marqeta's innovative payment platform. The partnership between Green Dot and Marqeta is expected to significantly benefit businesses by providing enhanced cash services.

news.headline: Rocket Lab's spacecraft successfully delivered Varda's manufacturing capsule back to Earth in South Australia.
news.summary: Rocket Lab's innovative Pioneer spacecraft successfully completed a re-entry mission for Varda's cutting-edge in-space manufacturing capsule in South Australia. Rocket Lab's Pioneer spacecraft, known by the designation RKLB, played a crucial role in this achievement.

news.headline: Affirm CFO to answer investor questions in fireside chat with Stocktwits on March 18, 2025 at 10:00 AM Eastern Time. CFO Rob O'Hare will discuss strategy, products, business model, and financial results.
news.summary: In San Francisco, Affirm Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AFRM) disclosed that CFO Rob O’Hare will be engaged in a fireside chat addressing key investor queries regarding the company's strategy, products, business model, and financial performance. The session, co-produced by Stocktwits and Stakeholder Labs, will air on March 18, 2025, at 10:00 AM Eastern Time. The chat aims to provide insights into Affirm's operations and future plans for growth.

news.headline: DigitalBridge will attend Citi’s Global Property CEO Conference in March 2025 in Hollywood, Florida. CEO Marc Ganzi will speak.
news.summary: DigitalBridge Group, Inc., a prominent global alternative asset manager focused on digital infrastructure investments, revealed that senior executives will be part of upcoming investor and industry events. The events include Citi’s 30th Annual Global Property CEO Conference in Hollywood, Florida, taking place from March 2 to 5. Marc Ganzi, the Chief Executive Officer of DigitalBridge, is set to deliver a fireside chat during the conference. DigitalBridge is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol DBRG.

news.headline: Dynaprice merges with Dinamo Acquisition Corp, led by Ilia Gogichaishvili, becoming strategic investment firm; founded in 1999.
news.summary: In New York, Dynaprice.com, Inc. has finalized a merger agreement with Dinamo Acquisition Corporation, transferring company control to a strategic investment firm helmed by finance executive and tech entrepreneur Ilia Gogichaishvili. The merger, completed after meeting all closing conditions, appoints Gogichaishvili as the CEO of the combined entity. Established in 1999, Dynaprice specializes in offering investment recovery software and data services.

news.headline: North America online language learning market to reach $9.78 billion by 2031, with CAGR of 19.3% from 2024.
news.summary: A report on the North America online language learning market indicates that it is expected to grow significantly, reaching a value of $9.78 billion by 2031. The market is projected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 19.3% from 2024 to 2031. Factors contributing to this growth include globalization and the increasing demand for language learning. The report covers various aspects such as learning modes, age groups, languages, end users, and countries in its analysis.

news.headline: AI is set to disrupt how companies are structured, challenging a fundamental assumption. #technology #business
Essential Utilities appoints Ed Vallejo as new Investor Relations Director with over 20 years of experience in the industry.
news.summary: Essential Utilities Inc. has named Ed Vallejo as the new investor relations director, as announced in Bryn Mawr, Pa. Vallejo, with over two decades of experience in investor relations within the water and wastewater sector, will be essential to Essential Utilities as it communicates its growth and operational achievements. Essential Utilities is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol WTRG. Christopher Franklin, Chairman and CEO of Essential Utilities, expressed enthusiasm about Vallejo joining the team, highlighting his expertise in the field.

news.headline: Global Partners LP (NYSE: GLP) reported Q4 and full-year 2024 financial results, with a focus on growth, CEO stated.
news.summary: In Waltham, Massachusetts, Global Partners LP (NYSE: GLP) announced their financial results for Q4 and fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024. CEO Eric Slifka expressed that 2024 marked a significant period of growth for the company in the U.S. liquid energy sector, enhancing their presence and capacity to cater to a burgeoning customer demographic across wholesale, retail, and commercial segments. The company saw positive developments and expansion during this period.

news.headline: Union Credit partners with 50+ credit unions to offer pre-approved deals in Experian app.
news.summary: In Santa Rosa, California, Union Credit has revealed that pre-approved offers from over 50 credit union partners can now be found on Experian’s mobile app.

news.headline: Luxury penthouse in Sacramento to sell at auction on Mar 21 without reserve, initially priced at $4.2 million.
news.summary: In Sacramento, California, a luxury penthouse condominium located in downtown will be auctioned off on March 21st. The property was originally listed for $4.2 million but will now be sold to the highest bidder without a reserve price.

news.headline: 49er TE George Kittle, Hidden Pearls & ABC Sports Foundation host Football for Change event in Los Cabos.
news.summary: In Los Cabos, Mexico on February 28, 2025, Hidden Pearls Podcast & Studio, a venture spearheaded by NFL player George Kittle, in collaboration with his father Bruce Kittle and sister Emma Kittle, partnered with the ABC Sports Foundation for the inaugural Football for Change event. This unique event aimed to merge sports and philanthropy, bringing together a diverse audience to promote positive social impact.

news.headline: Emmitsburg Mayor Frank Davis to raise $10,000 for homelessness with 24-hour challenge at Vigilant Hose Company.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, in Emmitsburg, Maryland, Mayor Frank Davis is planning to spend a full 24 hours outside the Vigilant Hose Company on 25 W. Main Street. The purpose of this initiative is to increase awareness about homelessness and hunger in the area. The goal is to raise $10,000 to support this cause. It is an attempt to draw attention to the pressing issues of homelessness and hunger within Frederick County, Maryland.

news.headline: Havis to display rugged fleet solutions at Work Truck Show 2025 in Indianapolis from March 4-7. #innovations #mobility
news.summary: A renowned company specializing in durable mobility solutions, Havis, is preparing to present its newest advancements at the upcoming Work Truck Show 2025 from March 4-7 at the Indiana Convention Center in Indianapolis, IN. This exclusive event gathers fleet professionals, offering a unique platform for industry networking and exploration of cutting-edge technologies.

news.headline: Rotary Club in Southern Frederick County to host Charity Golf Tournament on May 15, 2025 at Worthington Manor.
news.summary: In Southern Frederick County, Maryland, on February 28, 2025, the Rotary Club of Southern Frederick County located in Urbana revealed their plans for the upcoming Service Above Self Charity Golf Tournament. The event is set to take place on May 15, 2025, at the beautiful Worthington Manor Golf Club in Urbana.

news.headline: ConnectM invites investors to a live webinar on March 4 at 4:15 p.m. ET. Characters: 83
news.summary: In Marlborough, Massachusetts, ConnectM Technology Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: CNTM) has announced a webinar scheduled for March 4, 2025, at 4:15 p.m. ET. The event aims to engage investors and highlight the Company's focus on the electrification economy.

news.headline: Demandbase named a leader in Intent Data Providers for B2B in Q1 2025 report, scoring highest in 7 criteria.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 28, 2025, Demandbase, a leading provider of account-based GTM solutions for B2B companies, revealed that it achieved the highest scores in seven key criteria. These criteria encompass various aspects such as Volume of Signals, Data Integration & Delivery, and Partner Ecosystem. This recognition underscores Demandbase's strong position in the market, showcasing its exceptional performance and capabilities in critical areas. The company's success in these key criteria highlights its dedication to delivering top-notch services and solutions to its customers.

news.headline: White Mountains announces $1 per share annual dividend, payable on March 26, 2025 to shareholders as of Feb 27, 2025.
news.summary: In Hamilton, Bermuda, on February 27, 2025, the Board of Directors of White Mountains Insurance Group, Ltd. announced an annual dividend of $1.00 per share. The dividend will be paid in cash on March 26, 2025, to shareholders holding Common Shares as of the record date.

news.headline: Jasper Therapeutics to present briquilimab data at AAD Annual Meeting on March 7-11, 2025 for treatment of CSU and CIndU.
news.summary: Jasper Therapeutics, Inc., headquartered in Redwood City, California, revealed key information about their novel antibody therapy, briquilimab, during a late-breaking oral presentation at the 2025 AAD Annual Meeting in Orlando, FL. The therapy targets c-Kit to combat mast cell driven diseases like chronic spontaneous urticaria (CSU), chronic inducible urticaria (CIndU), and asthma. The data presented was from the Phase 1b/2a BEACON in CSU study, where patients from their January 8th, 2025 disclosure were included. Jasper is listed on the Nasdaq as JSPR, and is actively engaged in the clinical development of briquilimab.

news.headline: Varda Space Industries successfully reentered W-2 capsule in Australia, carrying payloads from Air Force and NASA.
news.summary: Varda Space Industries, Inc., based in El Segundo, California, successfully landed their second capsule, W-2, at the Koonibba Test Range. This dual-purpose mission carried payloads from the Air Force and NASA. The event took place on February 28, 2025. Varda Space Industries is a microgravity-enabled life sciences company, specializing in space research. The safe return of capsule W-2 marks a significant achievement for the company.

news.headline: Nichole Vasquez promoted to Regional Director of Operations for Marriott hotels in Frederick and Hagerstown, Maryland.
news.summary: In Frederick, Maryland as of February 28, 2025, Plamondon Hospitality Partners has promoted Nichole Vasquez to Regional Director of Operations for their Marriott hotels in Frederick and Hagerstown. Nichole has been with Plamondon for a significant period and will now oversee operations for these locations.

news.headline: Nano Labs received US$4.9 million in Bitcoin and USDT from unregistered sale of equity securities on Feb 28, 2025.
news.summary: In Hong Kong on February 28, 2025, Nano Labs Ltd (Nasdaq: NA), a prominent fabless integrated circuit design firm and product solution provider based in China, disclosed that it has recently acquired a total of $4.9 million in Bitcoin and USDT.

news.headline: AMD introduces new RDNA 4 architecture with RX 9000 Series graphics cards for high-end gaming with AI enhancements.
news.summary: The latest lineup of AMD Radeon™ RX 9000 Series graphics cards brings high-performance gaming experiences enhanced by artificial intelligence (AI). These cutting-edge graphics cards are designed to cater to enthusiasts, offering superior gaming capabilities.

news.headline: Anteris Technologies to present at TD Cowen and Barclays healthcare conferences. CEO to present at 45th Annual TD Cowen and Barclays 27th Annual.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, Anteris® Technologies Global Corp. (NASDAQ: AVR, ASX: AVR) based in Minneapolis and Brisbane, Australia, announced that its Chief Executive Officer, Wayne Paterson, is scheduled to present at two upcoming conferences: the 45th Annual TD Cowen Healthcare Conference and the Barclays 27th Annual Global Healthcare Conference. Anteris is a structural heart company known for developing DurAVR® THV, a revolutionary balloon-expandable heart valve. This innovative product is a first-in-class, biomimetic valve designed to address critical cardiac issues. These conferences are key opportunities for the company to showcase its advancements in the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Spectral AI (NASDAQ: MDAI) to report 2024 Q4 and full year financial results on March 27, 2025 after market close. Conference call to follow at 5:00 pm Eastern Time.
news.summary: Spectral AI, a developer of the AI-driven DeepView® System and listed on NASDAQ as MDAI, recently disclosed that they are set to reveal their financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year ended on December 31, 2024. This announcement will be made on March 27, 2025, after the market closes. The company, known for its Breakthrough Device Designation from the FDA in 2018, utilizes multi-spectral imaging and AI algorithms to forecast burn healing potential. A conference call is scheduled to take place at 5:00 pm Eastern Time on the same day to further delve into these results.

news.headline: Armlogi sees surge in shipping volume after partnering with Temu, a marketplace (Nasdaq: BTOC), boosting small parcel shipping.
news.summary: Armlogi Holding Corp., a warehousing and logistics company based in the U.S., revealed a rise in its small parcel shipping volume after connecting with the Temu marketplace. The company, listed as BTOC on Nasdaq, specializes in supply chain solutions for warehouse management and order fulfillment. This announcement was made today in Walnut, CA, on Feb. 28, 2025.

news.headline: Serve Robotics' CFO will participate in Cantor Global Technology Conference on Mar 11, 2025, at 3:40 pm ET.
news.summary: On February 28, 2025, Serve Robotics, a prominent autonomous sidewalk delivery firm, disclosed that its Chief Financial Officer Brian Read is scheduled to engage in a fireside conversation at the Cantor Global Technology Conference on March 11, 2025, commencing at 3:40 pm Eastern Time. Serve Robotics is traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol SERV.
